description: Reported Q1 new logos as 0 and new anchors as 0 in Scott McMichael prep sheet. Obsidian scorecard showed 0/0 but David confirmed actual Q1 result was 4 logos and 1 anchor.
correction: Q1 One Texas results through end of March: 4 new logos, 1 new anchor. Targets: 8 logos, 4 anchors.
systemic_fix: Obsidian scorecard may lag actuals — when David provides a correction on numbers, trust him and update immediately. Cross-check scorecard data against most recent email or verbal confirmation when available.
